Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Exclusivity for City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Networks) Regulations, 2008. namely :— 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Exclusivity tor City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Networks) Amendment Regulations, 2014. {2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazctte. 2. For regulation {1 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Exclusivity for City or Local Natural Gas Distribution Network) Regulations, 2008, the following shall be substituted, namely :— “HL. Miscellaneous. tfany question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the same shall be decided by the Board.” K. RAJESWARA RAO.
